sections.paragraph:
verb לבטול

to cease, stop; idle, bum

verb להיבטל

be idle, refrain from, desist

verb לבטל

put off, call off, cancel, abolish; void

verb בוטל

be made void, annulled; cancelled, abolished

verb להתבטל

to loiter, to idle away

verb להתבטל

be annulled, abolished

verb להבטיל

to idle, to stop; to abolish, cancel

verb מובטל

be idle, unemployed, laid off

verb לבטל (>>ביטל)

put off, call off, cancel, abolish; void

adjective

idle person; void, null
